title: Macro-based logging refactor
description: Convert direct logging calls to SingleLog LOG_/LOGF_ macros throughout the project and add detailed debug/trace logging without overwhelming hot paths.
acceptance_criteria: All actual log writes use LOG_* or LOGF_* macros instead of direct logging function calls.
LOG_FUNCTION_TRACE is used on lifecycle/setup/config functions where scope logging is useful and not excessive.
Server, agent, API, storage, enrollment, ZAP, and service paths include additional debug/trace context.
Hot loops avoid excessive function-scope logging.
Source files include common/SingleLog.hpp directly and no project logging wrapper is added.
Each binary configures SingleLog directly before runtime logging.
Docs, changelog, and version are updated.
Focused build/tests pass.
open_questions: Bazel build/test execution is blocked in this sandbox by Git Bash failing to create its signal pipe while rebuilding external libzmq (Win32 error 5).

tasks.title: Use SingleLog directly for setup
tasks.description: Remove the temporary common/logging.hpp wrapper and configure SingleLog directly in each binary entry point.
acceptance_criteria: common/logging.hpp is removed from the common Bazel library.
Server and agent configure console/file levels and log path through SingleLog::GetInstance().
tasks.implementation_notes: common/SingleLog.hpp already defines LOG_TRACE/LOGF_TRACE/etc and LOG_FUNCTION_TRACE. Do not wrap SingleLog; binary main files own SetConsoleLogLevel, SetFileLogLevel, and SetLogFilePath.

tasks.title: Convert direct log calls
tasks.description: Replace thewatcher::logging::{info,warning,error,critical,notice} style calls with LOG_/LOGF_ macros in agent, server, common service, and support files.
acceptance_criteria: No direct lower-case logging function calls remain.
Existing log messages keep their operational meaning.
Formatted logs use LOGF_* macros.

integration: Search confirms direct logging calls are gone.

tasks.implementation_notes: Convert files found by Select-String in agent/*.cpp, server/*.cpp, and common/windows_service.cpp. Keep direct SingleLog Set* calls only inside server/main.cpp and agent/main.cpp.

tasks.title: Add debug and trace detail
tasks.description: Add LOG_FUNCTION_TRACE and LOGF_TRACE/LOGF_DEBUG context to lifecycle, config, enrollment, API, store, ZAP, and command paths while avoiding noisy hot loops.
acceptance_criteria: Lifecycle/config functions have scope traces.
Frame handlers log concise trace/debug events instead of full function scope for every poll tick.
Collector registration and config updates are visible at debug/trace level.
tasks.implementation_notes: Avoid LOG_FUNCTION_TRACE in Agent::collection_loop, Agent::heartbeat_loop, Agent::io_loop, Server::handle_router_frame, and collector update methods to avoid per-frame noise.

tasks.title: Docs and verification
tasks.description: Update logging docs, bump version/changelog, complete plan, and run focused C++ tests/build.
acceptance_criteria: Logging docs mention LOG_/LOGF_ macros and LOG_FUNCTION_TRACE guidance.
Version increments from 0.2.16.
Changelog records the logging refactor.
Bazel build and focused tests pass.
tasks.implementation_notes: Updated docs/logging.md, MODULE.bazel, and CHANGELOG.md. Select-String verification passed and Bazel --nobuild analysis passed. Full build/tests are blocked by external libzmq Git Bash startup failure: couldn't create signal pipe, Win32 error 5.
